## 2026-07-10 Folded framework layout shells into the layout family

- candidate component
  - framework shell candidates:
    - `src/components/management-table-shell/index.tsx`
    - `src/components/summary-detail-layout-shell/index.tsx`
    - `src/components/tree-workspace-shell/index.tsx`
  - removed standalone stories:
    - `src/stories/management-table-shell.stories.tsx`
    - `src/stories/summary-detail-layout-shell.stories.tsx`
    - `src/stories/tree-workspace-shell.stories.tsx`
- why it was reviewed
  - 三个 story 都挂在 `Framework/Layout/*` 下，但仍各自占一个 root，和 `layout-family` 并列，导致 framework taxonomy 被拆散
  - 真实代码里它们都以跨 app 的 page-shell contract 复用，不是某个业务域独占的 leaf workflow
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - `ManagementTableShell` 统一表格页的 top section / toolbar / search / modal / table framing
    - `SummaryDetailLayoutShell` 统一 summary intro + routed detail + optional progress 的 detail workflow
    - `TreeWorkspaceShell` 统一 tree sidebar + workspace content + fixed/resizable sidebar mode
  - difference analysis:
    - `ManagementTableShell` 的差异主要在 search toolbar、row selection、modal slot、advanced table props
    - `SummaryDetailLayoutShell` 的差异主要在 horizontal / vertical summary 与 progress branch
    - `TreeWorkspaceShell` 的差异主要在 fixed / resizable sidebar、sidebar header、tree panel surface
    - 这些差异都属于同一个 framework layout family 内的 contract branches，不需要再拆成三个独立 root
- governance decision
  - 将三个 framework shell 全部并入 `src/stories/layout-family.stories.tsx`
  - 删除独立 framework story root，保持 `Framework/Layout/FamilyOverview` 作为 layout 体系唯一 Storybook 契约入口
- migration
  - updated:
    - `src/stories/layout-family.stories.tsx`
    - removed `src/stories/management-table-shell.stories.tsx`
    - removed `src/stories/summary-detail-layout-shell.stories.tsx`
    - removed `src/stories/tree-workspace-shell.stories.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - family 新增 `Framework workflow shells` 段
    - 保留 management / summary-detail / tree workspace 三组稳定 framework contract 变体
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Framework/Layout/FamilyOverview`
  - next migration target:
    - 继续检查 framework 目录下是否还有只代表同一 layout contract 分支、却仍单独占 root 的 shell story
## 2026-07-10 Folded OperateFormModal into the feedback family

- candidate component
  - framework shell candidate:
    - `src/components/operate-form-modal/index.tsx`
  - removed standalone story:
    - `src/stories/operate-form-modal.stories.tsx`
- why it was reviewed
  - `OperateFormModal` 已经作为共享 modal-action shell 被 alarm、cmdb、monitor、job、node-manager、ops-analysis、system-manager、mlops 等多个域复用
  - `feedback-family` 也已经承接 shared modal / drawer / footer taxonomy，继续保留独立 `Framework/Feedback/OperateFormModal` root 会把同一 feedback contract 再拆成一个额外入口
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 所有调用都共用同一套 title / subtitle / footer actions / secondary actions / hideFooter / confirm prompt / body content shell
    - 真实差异主要来自业务体内容和动作危险级别，而不是 modal 外层 contract
  - difference analysis:
    - 常规表单录入使用默认 confirm/cancel footer
    - destructive 分支依赖 confirm popconfirm 与 primary order 调整
    - selection / chooser 分支在 body 内复用 preview layout
    - import / topology 等 read-only or workflow 分支通过 hideFooter 或宽幅 viewer 变体表达
    - 这些差异都属于同一个 feedback modal shell 的稳定分支，不构成新的 Storybook root
- governance decision
  - 将 `OperateFormModal` 的代表性分支并入 `src/stories/feedback-family.stories.tsx`
  - 删除独立 framework story root，保持 `Framework/Feedback/FamilyOverview` 作为 feedback 组件体系唯一契约入口
- migration
  - updated:
    - `src/stories/feedback-family.stories.tsx`
    - removed `src/stories/operate-form-modal.stories.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - 在 `Modal shells` 段补充 destructive confirm、compact entry、selection preview、hideFooter workflow、wide viewer 等分支
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Framework/Feedback/FamilyOverview`
  - next migration target:
    - 继续检查 feedback / security / guards 范围内是否还有只描述同一 shared shell 分支、却仍单独占 root 的 framework story
## 2026-07-10 Folded K8sCollectorInstallShell into the feedback family

- candidate component
  - framework shell candidate:
    - `src/components/k8s-collector-install/index.tsx`
  - removed standalone story:
    - `src/stories/k8s-collector-install.stories.tsx`
- why it was reviewed
  - `K8sCollectorInstall` 只是 install command + verify status + success/fail feedback 的共享壳层，本身不承载 monitor/log/cmdb 的业务文案差异
  - 真实业务差异已经由 `K8sCollectorInstallStep` 与 monitor/log/cmdb preset 文案承接，继续保留独立 `Framework/Feedback/K8sCollectorInstallShell` root 会把 feedback taxonomy 再拆出一个旁支
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - monitor、log、cmdb 都复用同一套 install command、verify button、prev action、success/fail alert、common issues affordance
    - 差异主要在 copy preset、idle before generation、troubleshooting 文案和是否需要 common issues action
  - difference analysis:
    - monitor / log 主要是 ready-command 后直接 verify
    - cmdb 主要是 generate-command 后进入 idle -> waiting 分支
    - 这些差异都属于同一个 install-and-verify feedback shell 的稳定变体，不构成单独 Storybook root
- governance decision
  - 将 `K8sCollectorInstall` 的 waiting / idle / success / failed 四类壳层变体并入 `src/stories/feedback-family.stories.tsx`
  - 删除独立 framework story root，保持 `Framework/Feedback/FamilyOverview` 作为反馈壳层组件体系唯一契约入口
- migration
  - updated:
    - `src/stories/feedback-family.stories.tsx`
    - `src/stories/k8s-family.stories.tsx`
    - removed `src/stories/k8s-collector-install.stories.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - feedback family 新增 `Install and verification shell` 段
    - k8s family 保留业务预设与 onboarding workflow，但不再声称 install shell 仍由独立 framework story 承接
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Framework/Feedback/FamilyOverview`
  - next migration target:
    - 继续检查 feedback / guards / security 范围内是否还有只描述同一 shared framework contract 分支、却仍单独占 root 的 story

## 2026-07-10 Retained standalone framework roots after audit

- candidate component
  - retained standalone roots:
    - `src/stories/code-editor.stories.tsx`
    - `src/stories/permission.stories.tsx`
- why they were reviewed
  - 两者都在跨域复用，表面上看像下一批可收口候选
  - 但本轮重点不是“能不能并”，而是验证它们是否真能被现有 family 无损承接
- cross-app comparison
  - `CodeEditor`
    - reused by:
      - monitor collect-template editing
      - node-manager config authoring
      - 以及 standalone framework editor 契约
    - difference analysis:
      - 真实差异集中在 mode、readonly/editable、fullscreen、copy toolbar、loading overlay、legacy `showCopy`
      - 这些都属于 editor-specific contract，本身不是 content / feedback / business workflow 的分支
  - `Permission`
    - reused by:
      - alarm、cmdb、node-manager、ops-analysis、system-manager、opspilot 等多个域
    - difference analysis:
      - 真实差异集中在 `requiredPermissions`、`instPermissions`、`fallback`、tooltip、event swallowing
      - 这是跨域 authorization guard contract，不属于 security form、navigation flow 或 feedback shell 的子分支
- governance decision
  - `CodeEditor` 暂时保留 `Framework/Editors/CodeEditor` 独立 root
  - `Permission` 暂时保留 `Framework/Guards/Permission` 独立 root
  - 原因不是放弃治理，而是避免为了提高合并率把 framework taxonomy 塞进错误 family，制造新的垃圾分类
- migration
  - no file moves this round for these two roots
  - action taken:
    - 在治理层明确记录“经审计后保留独立 root”的决定，防止后续重复审计同一问题
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Framework/Editors/CodeEditor`
    - `Framework/Guards/Permission`
  - next migration target:
    - 继续优先处理那些已被现有 family 明确承接、但仍残留 standalone root 的候选，而不是硬并 editor / guard 这类基础契约

  - 保留组件实现不变，只统一 story file 与 title，让 settings 域的 source of truth 与现有 family taxonomy 对齐
- migration
  - updated:
    - added `src/stories/ops-analysis-settings-family.stories.tsx`
    - removed `src/stories/ops-analysis-settings-list-shell.stories.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - `Default` 正名为 `Overview`
    - 保留 empty-state、shared import、directory-target import 三类 workflow 分支
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/OpsAnalysis/Settings/FamilyOverview`
  - next migration target:

## 2026-07-10 Normalized family filenames for monitor and log widget roots

- candidate component
  - business family roots:
    - `src/stories/log-analysis-widgets.stories.tsx`
    - `src/stories/monitor-dashboard-widgets.stories.tsx`
- why it was reviewed
  - 两个 story 的 title 都已经分别落在 `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview` 与 `Business/Monitor/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - 但文件名仍停留在旧的 widgets root 命名，和当前 Storybook family taxonomy 不一致，后续做 root 盘点时容易被误判成尚未治理完成的 leaf/legacy root
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 两者都不是单个 widget 的 leaf story，而是承接各自域内一组稳定 widget contract 的 family root
    - 两者都已经被 `FamilyOverview` title 用作 Storybook source of truth
  - difference analysis:
    - monitor family 侧重 dashboard panel、stat card、trend/ring/stacked bar 等监控概览 widgets
    - log family 侧重 line/bar/pie/table/message/sankey/scatter 等日志分析 widgets
    - 差异在业务域，不在治理层命名规则；命名规则应统一遵守 family root 约定
- governance decision
  - 保持 title 与 story 内容不变，只把文件名正名为 family 命名
  - 让 Storybook 目录、治理文档与剩余 root 审计都围绕同一套 `*-family.stories.tsx` 规则收敛
- migration
  - updated:
    - added `src/stories/log-analysis-widgets-family.stories.tsx`
    - removed `src/stories/log-analysis-widgets.stories.tsx`
    - added `src/stories/monitor-dashboard-widgets-family.stories.tsx`
    - removed `src/stories/monitor-dashboard-widgets.stories.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - 无运行时组件改动
    - 无 Story title 改动
    - 仅修正 Storybook family root 文件命名，降低后续治理歧义
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/Monitor/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - next migration target:
    - 继续审计 `web/src/app/*/components` 下仍重复出现的非业务型 wrapper / chart shell，优先找还能进一步并入 shared framework family 的候选

## 2026-07-10 Reused shared LogAnalysisBar for duplicated MySQL and Redis instance bars

- candidate component
  - duplicated business wrappers:
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/mysql/mysqlInstanceBar.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/redis/redisInstanceBar.tsx`
  - shared component:
    - `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/bar.tsx`
- why it was reviewed
  - 两个 dashboard widget 都只是把 `rawData` 里的一个分类字段和一个数值字段映射成横向单序列柱状图
  - 原实现各自复制了同一套数据清洗与 `HorizontalCategoryBarChart` 装配逻辑，没有复用已经进入 Storybook family 的 `LogAnalysisBar`

  - shared structure:

    - 差异仅在默认 `displayMaps.value` 字段：一个默认 `slow_count`，一个默认 `log_count`

  - 保留 `MysqlInstanceBar` / `RedisInstanceBar` 作为业务语义别名，只负责注入默认字段映射与兼容既有调用点
- migration
  - updated:
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/mysql/mysqlInstanceBar.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/redis/redisInstanceBar.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - 两个 widget 从手写 `HorizontalCategoryBarChart` 实现改为薄包装 `LogAnalysisBar`
    - 继续保留既有 props 入口：`rawData`、`loading`、`config`
    - 默认 `displayMaps` 与横向布局在 wrapper 层注入，避免破坏现有页面调用
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - next migration target:
    - 继续检查 log analysis dashboard 里其它只做字段预设或外观预设的 widget wrapper，优先复用现有 family 组件而不是保留平行实现

  - duplicated business wrappers:

  - migration shape:

  - updated stories:

## 2026-07-10 Reused shared dual-trend contract for Docker, MySQL, and Redis

- candidate component
  - duplicated business wrappers:
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/docker/dockerDualLine.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/mysql/mysqlDualLine.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/redis/redisTrendLine.tsx`
  - shared component:
    - `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/dual-trend.tsx`
- why it was reviewed
  - 这三个 widget 都在表达“主序列总量 + 次序列异常/次指标”的同一双折线趋势语法
  - 现状里 MySQL 只是复用 Docker wrapper，Redis 则复制了同一壳层并加了一个“次序列全 0 时隐藏”的分支，说明 shared contract 已经自然形成
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 都基于时间轴渲染 `TimeSeriesComposedChart`
    - 主序列都使用 area line，次序列使用第二条 area line
    - 网格、字号、轴 formatter、颜色分工与整体视觉语言一致
  - difference analysis:
    - Docker / MySQL 兼容 `_time` 与 `time` 两种时间字段
    - Redis 只多一个“错误序列全 0 时退化成单轴”的业务规则
    - 差异停留在字段映射和显隐规则，不足以支撑三套实现
- governance decision
  - 新增 shared `LogAnalysisDualTrend`
  - Docker / Redis 保留 thin wrapper 负责字段映射与业务命名，MySQL 继续通过 Docker wrapper 继承同一治理后的 shared contract
- migration
  - updated:
    - added `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/dual-trend.tsx`
    - updated `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/index.ts`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/docker/dockerDualLine.tsx`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/redis/redisTrendLine.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - shared 组件承接双折线趋势壳层
    - wrapper 只保留字段映射、默认 label 与 Redis 的 zero-error hide 规则
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 在 log-analysis widgets family 中新增 `LogAnalysisDualTrend` 通用态
    - 同时补充 Docker / MySQL / Redis preset，明确它们属于同一 shared trend contract

## 2026-07-10 Reused shared metrics-trend contract for multi-metric log widgets

- candidate component
  - duplicated business wrappers:
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/kafka/kafkaTrend.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/mongodb/mongodbTrend.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/postgresql/postgresqlTrend.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/rabbitmq/rabbitmqTrend.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/syslog/syslogTrend.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/elasticsearch/elasticsearchTrend.tsx`
  - shared component:
    - `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/metrics-trend.tsx`
- why it was reviewed
  - 这组 widget 都在重复实现同一个 total-plus-secondary metrics trend grammar：共享时间轴、主序列总量、若干次序列指标、统一双轴和同一视觉语言
  - 差异主要落在 primary 是否用 bar/line、secondary 指标数量、文案和字段名，而不是交互结构本身
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 全部基于 `_time` 时间序列
    - 都使用一个 primary metric + 一到三条 secondary metrics
    - yAxis formatter、第二轴 splitLine、色彩层级完全同构
  - difference analysis:
    - Kafka / MongoDB / PostgreSQL / RabbitMQ 是 primary bar + 3 secondary lines
    - Syslog 是 primary bar + 1 secondary line
    - Elasticsearch 是 primary line + 3 secondary lines
    - 这些差异属于同一 shared contract 的变体维度
- governance decision
  - 新增 shared `LogAnalysisMetricsTrend`
  - 各业务 wrapper 保留指标语义和字段映射，不再重复维护图表壳层
- migration
  - updated:
    - added `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/metrics-trend.tsx`
    - updated `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/index.ts`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/kafka/kafkaTrend.tsx`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/mongodb/mongodbTrend.tsx`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/postgresql/postgresqlTrend.tsx`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/rabbitmq/rabbitmqTrend.tsx`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/syslog/syslogTrend.tsx`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/elasticsearch/elasticsearchTrend.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - shared 组件承接统一图表语法
    - wrapper 只保留 primary/secondary 指标定义与业务文案
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 在 log-analysis widgets family 中新增 `LogAnalysisMetricsTrend` 通用态
    - 同时补充 Kafka / PostgreSQL / Elasticsearch presets，覆盖 primary bar、primary line 与多指标分支

## 2026-07-13 Reused shared summary-breakdown pie contract for MySQL, Redis, and Docker donuts

- candidate component
  - duplicated business wrappers:
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/mysql/mysqlDonut.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/redis/redisDonut.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/docker/dockerSeverityDonut.tsx`
  - shared component:
    - `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/summary-breakdown-pie.tsx`
- why it was reviewed
  - 这三个 donut 都在重复同一套 adapter：从单行 summary 聚合结果里读取若干 bucket 字段，必要时再补一个剩余 bucket，然后交给 shared pie 展示
  - 差异只在 bucket 列表、是否需要 remainder、以及最终字段命名
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 都消费 `rawData[0]` 作为 summary row
    - 都把 summary row 转换成 `{name,value}` 风格的 bucket 列表
    - 都没有独立交互逻辑，只是 shared pie 的数据适配层
  - difference analysis:
    - MySQL 只需要固定 bucket 列表
    - Redis / Docker 需要用 `total_count - sum(buckets)` 计算 remainder
    - 字段名分别是 `bucket/cnt`、`name/count`、`level/cnt`
    - 这些都是 shared adapter 的配置维度
- governance decision
  - 新增 shared `LogAnalysisSummaryBreakdownPie`
  - 业务 wrapper 只保留 bucket 语义和 remainder 规则，底层统一走 `LogAnalysisPie`
- migration
  - updated:
    - added `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/summary-breakdown-pie.tsx`
    - updated `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/index.ts`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/mysql/mysqlDonut.tsx`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/redis/redisDonut.tsx`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/docker/dockerSeverityDonut.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - MySQL / Redis / Docker donut 从各自手写 summary adapter 改成 thin wrapper
    - HTTP status category donut 仍保留独立实现，因为它属于多行状态聚合归类，而不是单行 summary breakdown
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 在 log-analysis widgets family 中新增 `LogAnalysisSummaryBreakdownPie` 通用态
    - 同时补充 MySQL / Redis / Docker presets，明确这三个 donut 属于同一 shared breakdown contract

- governance decision
  - 新增 shared `LogAnalysisCategoryBar`
  - Docker / Flow / Redis wrapper 只保留字段映射、series 语义和少量布局参数
- migration
  - updated:
    - added `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/category-bar.tsx`
    - updated `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/index.ts`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/docker/dockerBarChart.tsx`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/redis/redisNodeCompareBar.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - `DockerBarChart` 从 app-local 实现转为 thin wrapper
    - `FlowBar` 继续作为业务别名透传 `DockerBarChart`
    - `RedisNodeCompareBar` 改为 shared contract 的双系列 preset
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 在 log-analysis widgets family 中新增 `LogAnalysisCategoryBar` 通用态
    - 同时补充 Flow preset 与 Redis node compare preset，覆盖单系列和双系列分支

## 2026-07-13 Removed cross-business wrapper chaining for FlowBar and MysqlDualLine

- candidate component
  - indirect business wrapper chains:
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/flows/flowBar.tsx` -> `docker/dockerBarChart.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/mysql/mysqlDualLine.tsx` -> `docker/dockerDualLine.tsx`
- why it was reviewed
  - 前面虽然已经把 DockerBarChart / DockerDualLine 收成 thin wrappers，但 Flow 与 MySQL 还在通过 Docker 业务 wrapper 间接复用 shared contract
  - 这会保留“业务组件依赖另一个业务组件”的谱系噪音，不利于长期治理
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - FlowBar 真正依赖的是 horizontal category bar contract
    - MysqlDualLine 真正依赖的是 dual-trend contract
  - difference analysis:
    - 差异不在契约，只在它们仍通过 Docker 业务入口中转
- governance decision
  - FlowBar 与 MysqlDualLine 直接依赖 shared `LogAnalysisCategoryBar` / `LogAnalysisDualTrend`
  - Docker 业务 wrapper 继续保留自己的业务入口，但不再充当其它业务域的中转层
- migration
  - updated:
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/flows/flowBar.tsx`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/mysql/mysqlDualLine.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - 仅移除间接依赖链，不改业务 props 入口
    - 行为和 Storybook contract 保持不变
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 无需新增 story root；既有 `LogAnalysisCategoryBar` 与 `LogAnalysisDualTrend` family 契约已覆盖这两类业务入口

## 2026-07-13 Reused existing LogAnalysisTable for HTTP request and Docker log tail widgets

- candidate component
  - duplicated / legacy wrappers:
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/http/httpRequestTable.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/docker/dockerLogTail.tsx`
  - reused shared component:
    - `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/table.tsx`
- why it was reviewed
  - 这两个 widget 还依赖一个仓库中不存在的 app-local `../comTable` 壳层
  - 同时它们的真实契约都已经落在 shared `LogAnalysisTable` 的能力范围内：数组结果展示、列定义透传、横向滚动
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 都是 log-analysis dashboard 表格型 widget
    - 都把处理后的行数组与 columns 交给 table shell 渲染
    - 都没有独立的 table 容器或高度计算语义
  - difference analysis:
    - HTTP request table 负责多查询结果合并
    - Docker log tail 负责 tail rows 的展示格式化
    - 差异停留在数据归一化与列定义，不需要继续保留独立旧壳
- governance decision
  - 统一复用既有 `LogAnalysisTable`
  - `HttpRequestTable` 与 `DockerLogTail` 只保留数据归一化和列语义
- migration
  - updated:
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/http/httpRequestTable.tsx`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/docker/dockerLogTail.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - 移除悬空的 `ComTable` 依赖
    - 直接落到 shared table contract，并保留业务 columns / scroll 配置
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 在 `LogAnalysisTable` 段补充 Docker log tail 风格的紧凑日志列示例，明确 shared table shell 已覆盖这类 tail widget 契约

## 2026-07-13 Deferred extraction for remaining single-domain log trends

- candidate component
  - reviewed business widgets:
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/fileIntegrity/fileIntegrityTrend.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/http/httpRequestTrend.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/http/httpStatusTrend.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/docker/dockerAreaChart.tsx`
- why they were reviewed
  - 这四个 widget 仍然直接基于 `TimeSeriesComposedChart` 组装 series，看起来像潜在 shared 候选
  - 但组件治理目标不是继续增加 shared 数量，而是只对真实跨业务重复做收敛
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 都使用相同的底层时间序列图表基座
    - 都属于 log-analysis dashboard 的趋势类 widget
  - difference analysis:
    - `fileIntegrityTrend` 是 3 bars + 1 permission line 的文件完整性语义
    - `httpRequestTrend` 是 requests + avg/p95 latency 的双轴 HTTP 语义
    - `httpStatusTrend` 需要先做 status category 聚合，再渲染 2xx/3xx/4xx/5xx 多线趋势
    - `dockerAreaChart` 是 Docker 域自己的双线 area 语义，目前没有第二个业务入口复用同一 contract
    - 这些差异不只是字段名差异，而是聚合模型、坐标轴语义和交互关注点都不同
- governance decision
  - 本轮不新增 shared component
  - 继续保留为业务组件，避免基于单业务场景制造 API 含混的垃圾 shared
  - 后续只有在出现第二个真实复用来源，或现有 shared contract 已能自然承接时，才继续迁移
- migration
  - updated:
    - 无代码迁移
  - migration shape:
    - 记录为治理审计结论，作为后续抽象门槛
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 暂不新增 shared story；若未来出现第二个复用来源，再为对应 shared contract 建立 family preset

## 2026-07-13 Deferred extraction for KPI and single-value cards across apps

- candidate component
  - reviewed components:
    - `src/components/log-analysis-widgets/single.tsx`
    - `src/components/ops-analysis-widgets/single.tsx`
    - `src/components/log-kpi-card/index.tsx`
    - `src/components/summary-metric-card/index.tsx`
    - `src/components/monitor-dashboard-widgets/stat-card.tsx`
- why they were reviewed
  - 这几类组件都以 `ChartSurface` / `AutoFitMetricValue` 为底座，表面上都属于 KPI / single-value card
  - 但“不要在不同 app 下重复框架组件”的前提，是它们真的共享同一个上层契约，而不是只共享排版原语
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 都复用了 `AutoFitMetricValue`
    - 多数都复用了 `ChartSurface` 或同等的指标卡容器
    - 它们真正共享的稳定层，已经是字体自适配与卡片可用态容器，而不是更高一层的业务 card API
  - difference analysis:
    - `LogAnalysisSingle` 是 log widget family 的纯单值 tile，没有 compare、label、icon、footer 语义
    - `OpsAnalysisSingle` 是 topology single-value node，包含 compare、threshold colors、value mappings、fallback sparkline 与 datasource 字段语义
    - `LogKpiCard` 是 log summary KPI，内建 period compare 与 sparkline 计算模型
    - `SummaryMetricCard` 是通用信息摘要卡，强调 label/icon/subtitle/footer 编排，而不负责趋势计算
    - `StatCard` 是 monitor dashboard KPI，包含固定 header/icon/compare/footer/mini-trend 版式与 monitor 主题样式 contract
    - 它们的差异已经落到信息架构和交互语义层，不只是 props 命名差异
- governance decision
  - 本轮不新增 cross-app shared KPI shell
  - 保持现状：共享层停在 `AutoFitMetricValue` 与 `ChartSurface`
  - 只有当至少两个 app 对外暴露出相同的 label/icon/compare/trend 组合契约时，才考虑向上抽出新的 framework card
- migration
  - updated:
    - 无代码迁移
  - migration shape:
    - 记录为治理边界，避免把不同业务 card 误合并成宽而虚的 shared API
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Summary/*`
    - `Business/OpsAnalysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
    - `Framework/DataDisplay/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/Monitor/*`
  - updated stories:
    - 暂不新增统一 KPI story root；继续由各自 family / business root 维护契约，直到出现足够强的跨 app 复用模式

## 2026-07-13 Removed pure passthrough log widget wrappers after shared contract stabilized

- candidate component
  - removed app-local passthrough wrappers:
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/apache/apacheTrend.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/nginx/nginxTrend.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/syslog/syslogKpiCard.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/postgresql/postgresqlKpiCard.tsx`
- why they were reviewed
  - 这 4 个文件已经不携带任何业务语义，只是把 props 原样转发给已治理的 shared component
  - shared contract 已由 Storybook 和前序治理确定后，继续保留 app-local 组件文件会放大“同一组件多入口”的噪音
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - `apacheTrend` / `nginxTrend` 都是 `LogAnalysisRequestErrorTrend` 的零配置转发
    - `syslogKpiCard` / `postgresqlKpiCard` 都是 `LogAnalysisLatestValueKpiCard` 的零配置转发
    - 它们与 shared contract 的差异已经为零
  - difference analysis:
    - 没有额外字段映射、默认文案、样式分支或数据预处理
    - 因此这些文件不再属于“业务组件”，而只是冗余入口
- governance decision
  - 直接让 dashboard registry 指向 shared component
  - 删除零业务增量 wrapper 文件，避免在 app 目录继续保留重复组件入口
- migration
  - updated:
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/components/widgetWrapper.tsx`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/syslog/index.ts`
    - updated `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/postgresql/index.ts`
  - removed:
    - removed `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/apache/apacheTrend.tsx`
    - removed `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/nginx/nginxTrend.tsx`
    - removed `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/syslog/syslogKpiCard.tsx`
    - removed `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/postgresql/postgresqlKpiCard.tsx`
    - removed `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/apache/index.ts`
    - removed `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/nginx/index.ts`
  - migration shape:
    - `apacheTrend` / `nginxTrend` 直接映射到 `LogAnalysisRequestErrorTrend`
    - `syslogKpiCard` / `postgresqlKpiCard` 直接映射到 `LogAnalysisLatestValueKpiCard`
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/Log/Summary/LogKpiCard`
  - updated stories:
    - 无需新增 story；这次迁移的目标正是让既有 shared story 成为唯一契约入口

## 2026-07-13 Reused one 404 page implementation for route fallback and explicit `/no-found`

- candidate component
  - duplicated route-level UI implementations:
    - `src/app/not-found.tsx`
    - `src/app/no-found/page.tsx`
- why it was reviewed
  - layout 里仍会显式跳转 `/no-found`，同时 Next 的 `not-found.tsx` 也维护同一份 404 视图
  - 两个入口需要共存，但不需要继续维护两份完全相同的 `PageStatus` JSX
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 两个文件都渲染同一 `PageStatus` 404 状态页
    - 文案、action 和 image alt 完全相同
  - difference analysis:
    - 差异只在路由入口语义：一个是显式 `/no-found` 页面，一个是 Next 的 not-found fallback
    - 这不是两个组件契约，只是同一组件的两个路由挂载点
- governance decision
  - 保留两个路由入口
  - 复用同一个 404 页面实现，避免 route-level duplicated UI
- migration
  - updated:
    - updated `src/app/no-found/page.tsx`
  - migration shape:
    - `/no-found` 直接复用 `src/app/not-found.tsx` 的默认实现

  - source of truth:

  - updated stories:

## 2026-07-13 Deferred extraction for app runtime wrappers that inject domain APIs or context

- candidate components
  - reviewed runtime entrypoints:
    - `src/app/monitor/components/monitorLazyMetricItemRuntime.tsx`
    - `src/app/monitor/components/monitorLineChartRuntime.tsx`
    - `src/app/ops-analysis/components/opsAnalysisImportModalRuntime.tsx`
    - `src/app/opspilot/components/knowledgeQADetailDrawerRuntime.tsx`
    - `src/app/node-manager/components/collectorPackageModalRuntime.tsx`
    - `src/app/alarm/components/alarmMatchRuleRuntime.tsx`
    - `src/app/cmdb/components/cmdbSubscriptionRuleFormRuntime.tsx`
    - `src/app/cmdb/components/cmdbSubscriptionDrawerRuntime.tsx`
- why they were reviewed
  - 这些文件都位于 app 目录，但都在复用 shared business component
  - 需要确认它们是不是和前面 log dashboard 一样的零业务增量 wrapper，还是保留业务 runtime 边界更合理
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 都以 `src/components/*` 下的 shared component 为真实 UI 契约
    - Storybook 已直接覆盖这些 shared component 的视觉与交互契约
  - difference analysis:
    - `monitor*Runtime` 注入 monitor context 的单位解析能力，不只是 props 透传
    - `opsAnalysisImportModalRuntime`、`knowledgeQADetailDrawerRuntime`、`collectorPackageModalRuntime` 注入各自业务域的 API action
    - `alarmMatchRuleRuntime` 注入告警等级元数据与 source 加载策略
    - `cmdbSubscription*Runtime` 负责拼装 model/user/channel/cloud 等运行时依赖与数据归一化
    - 差异点落在业务域依赖装配，而不是同一 shared 组件的重复视觉实现
- governance decision
  - 暂不把这类 runtime wrapper 提升为新的 cross-app shared component
  - shared 边界停留在 `src/components/*` 的组件本体；app 目录保留业务 runtime 作为领域依赖注入层
  - 后续若多个 app 出现相同的 runtime 依赖装配模式，再考虑抽成明确的 business shared runtime
- migration
  - current state:
    - 本轮不迁移实现，只统一治理边界认知
  - follow-up direction:
    - 继续优先清理零业务增量 wrapper
    - 对有真实依赖装配语义的 runtime，只在本域内部做 helper 收敛，不跨 app 强行合并
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - 继续由对应 shared component 所在 family story 承接组件契约
  - updated stories:
    - 本轮无需新增 story；runtime 不是 Storybook source of truth，shared component 才是

## 2026-07-13 Storybook root inventory audit confirms family-only governance

- candidate components
  - reviewed Storybook roots:
    - all `src/stories/*.stories.tsx` entries
  - reviewed title contracts:
    - all Storybook `title` declarations under `src/stories/*.stories.tsx`
- why they were reviewed
  - 用户明确要求 Storybook 按框架组件 / 业务组件分层治理，且不要保留垃圾组件或垃圾 root
  - 需要确认当前 source of truth 是否已经从 leaf-story 碎片态收敛为 family-first 目录结构
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 当前 stories 文件层面只保留 family roots，以及两个有明确治理豁免的 standalone roots：
      - `src/stories/code-editor.stories.tsx`
      - `src/stories/permission.stories.tsx`
    - 其余 story root 全部采用 `*-family.stories.tsx` 命名
    - title 层面也统一落在 `Framework/*/FamilyOverview` 或 `Business/*/FamilyOverview`
  - difference analysis:
    - `CodeEditor` 仍是编辑器框架契约，不适合并入现有 family
    - `Permission` 仍是跨域权限守卫契约，不适合并入现有 family
    - 除这两项外，没有发现继续保留旧 leaf root 或旧 taxonomy title 的证据
- governance decision
  - 将当前 Storybook root 状态确认为 family-only governance
  - 继续只允许 `CodeEditor` 与 `Permission` 作为明确批准的 standalone root 存在
  - 后续新增 shared component 时，默认必须进入对应 family；没有充分边界理由时，不新增 standalone root
- migration
  - current state:
    - 本轮不改 stories 实现，记录 inventory audit 结论
  - follow-up direction:
    - 未来审计以当前 inventory 为基线，发现新的 standalone root 即视为治理回退信号
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - family stories remain the only default source of truth
  - updated stories:
    - 本轮无需新增 story；重点是确认现有 root inventory 已完成收敛

## 2026-07-13 Deferred extraction for integration instance edit runtimes

- candidate components
  - reviewed instance edit entrypoints:
    - `src/app/monitor/(pages)/integration/asset/editInstance.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/integration/receive/editInstance.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/integration/grouping/editInstance.tsx`
    - shared contract:
      - `src/components/integration-instance-edit-modal/index.tsx`
- why they were reviewed
  - monitor 与 log 都存在 `editInstance.tsx` 命名入口
  - 需要确认它们是否仍有跨 app 重复实现没有被 shared component 吸收
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - `monitor/(...)/asset/editInstance.tsx` 与 `log/(...)/receive/editInstance.tsx` 都已复用 shared `IntegrationInstanceEditModal`
    - 两者只负责注入各自业务域的 API action、字段标签与 instance name 读取方式
    - Storybook 已在 `Business/Integrations/FamilyOverview` 中直接覆盖 `IntegrationInstanceEditModal` 的 edit / batch 契约
  - difference analysis:
    - monitor runtime 使用 `instance_name` / `instance_id` 字段，并调用 monitor integration API
    - log receive runtime 使用 `name` / `id` 字段，并调用 log integration API
    - `log/(...)/grouping/editInstance.tsx` 不是同一 shared modal 的薄 wrapper，而是带 rule mode、conditions、field discovery 的独立日志分组业务工作流
    - 因此当前差异点仍主要落在业务域 API 与数据模型，而不是 shared modal 的重复 UI
- governance decision
  - 暂不把 monitor/log receive 两个 runtime 再上提为新的 cross-app shared runtime
  - 继续让 `IntegrationInstanceEditModal` 作为唯一共享 UI 契约
  - `log grouping editInstance` 保持独立业务组件，不并入 instance edit modal 族
- migration
  - current state:
    - 本轮不改实现
  - follow-up direction:
    - 若后续 monitor、log、alarm 等再出现第 3 个以上同形 instance-edit runtime，可考虑抽一个 integration runtime helper
    - 在此之前，避免为仅两处的 API 注入模式新增抽象层
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Integrations/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 无需新增 story；shared modal 契约已存在，runtime 不进入 Storybook

## 2026-07-13 Deferred extraction for alarm settings operate modals beyond shared rule building blocks

- candidate components
  - reviewed settings modals:
    - `src/app/alarm/(pages)/settings/alertAssign/components/operateModal.tsx`
    - `src/app/alarm/(pages)/settings/alertEnrichment/components/operateModal.tsx`
    - `src/app/alarm/(pages)/settings/shieldStrategy/components/operateModal.tsx`
    - `src/app/alarm/(pages)/settings/correlationRules/components/operateModal.tsx`
  - reviewed shared building blocks:
    - `src/app/alarm/components/alarmMatchRuleRuntime.tsx`
    - `src/components/alarm-match-rule/index.tsx`
    - `src/components/alarm-rule-scope-field`
    - `src/components/operate-form-drawer`
- why they were reviewed
  - 这四个页面都以 `operateModal` 命名，且都落在 alarm settings 域内
  - 需要确认它们之间是否还有一层未被抽出的 shared business modal
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 多个 modal 已统一复用 `OperateFormDrawer`
    - `alertAssign`、`alertEnrichment`、`shieldStrategy`、`correlationRules` 都在不同程度上复用 `AlarmMatchRuleRuntime`
    - 其中多处已通过 `AlarmRuleScopeField` 统一承接 all/filter 作用范围切换与 match rule 承载区
  - difference analysis:
    - `alertAssign` 的核心是通知渠道、分派人员、通知频率与升级链
    - `alertEnrichment` 的核心是 provider / namespace / input binding / output projection
    - `shieldStrategy` 的核心是抑制时间窗口与筛选条件
    - `correlationRules` 的核心是去重、心跳缺失、即时告警等多策略配置与排序逻辑
    - 差异已经落在业务工作流骨架、表单模型与提交 payload，而不只是字段文案或 props 注入
- governance decision
  - alarm settings modal 的共享层应停在 `OperateFormDrawer`、`AlarmRuleScopeField`、`AlarmMatchRuleRuntime` 这些 building blocks
  - 暂不新增一个笼统的 alarm settings shared modal，以免把已经明显分叉的业务工作流压扁
  - 后续优先继续抽取局部共享区块，而不是强行合并整页 modal
- migration
  - current state:
    - 本轮不迁移实现
  - follow-up direction:
    - 若后续发现 `effective time`、`notification frequency`、`provider binding` 等局部区域再次在多个 modal 中重复，可按局部子面板继续 shared 化
    - 但整页 `operateModal` 仍按各自业务域保留
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Alarm/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 无需新增 story；本轮结论是继续让 family story 承接共享 building blocks，而不是新增新的 modal root

## 2026-07-13 Deferred extraction for alarm integration overview cards beyond shared metric primitives

- candidate components
  - reviewed alarm integration overview UI:
    - `src/app/alarm/(pages)/integration/components/IntegrationCard.tsx`
    - `src/app/alarm/(pages)/integration/components/SummaryStats.tsx`
  - reviewed nearby shared contracts:
    - `src/components/integration-catalog-card/index.tsx`
    - `src/components/summary-metric-card/index.tsx`
- why they were reviewed
  - alarm integration 页面存在卡片概览与顶部统计区块，外形上容易与 integrations family 和 data-display family 的 shared card 契约混淆
  - 需要判断它们是否还存在可继续抽出的 cross-app 组件
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - `SummaryStats` 已经直接复用 `SummaryMetricCard` 作为 KPI/统计卡的基础壳
    - `IntegrationCard` 与 `IntegrationCatalogCard` 都属于 integration domain 下的卡片式呈现
  - difference analysis:
    - `SummaryStats` 的共享层已经落在 `SummaryMetricCard`，当前差异主要是告警源活跃度、今日事件量与环比文案的业务计算
    - `IntegrationCard` 的核心是告警源健康推导、事件数格式化、最近事件时间与详情跳转，不是 catalog onboarding card 的同类语义
    - `IntegrationCatalogCard` 面向接入目录选择；`IntegrationCard` 面向已接入告警源运行态概览，两者不是一个 shared contract 的不同 preset
- governance decision
  - 不新增 alarm integration shared overview card
  - 继续复用 `SummaryMetricCard` 这类底层 primitive
  - `IntegrationCard` 保持为 alarm integration 页面级业务组件，避免把 catalog card 与 runtime status card 混成同一抽象
- migration
  - current state:
    - 本轮不迁移实现
  - follow-up direction:
    - 若 monitor、log、alarm 后续都出现同形“已接入源运行态概览卡”，再评估是否抽成统一的 runtime status card
    - 在出现跨域重复之前，保持 alarm integration card 为业务组件
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Alarm/FamilyOverview` 继续承接 alarm 业务卡片语义
    - `Framework/DataDisplay/FamilyOverview` 继续承接 `SummaryMetricCard` 基础契约
  - updated stories:
    - 本轮无需新增 story；现阶段共享层已经由既有 family 覆盖

## 2026-07-13 Confirmed shared SNMP trap guide panel across alarm and log integrations

- candidate components
  - reviewed app entrypoints:
    - `src/app/alarm/components/snmpTrapGuide/index.tsx`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/integration/list/detail/configure/snmpTrapConfiguration.tsx`
  - reviewed shared contract:
    - `src/components/snmp-trap-guide-panel/index.tsx`
- why they were reviewed
  - alarm 与 log 两个域都存在 SNMP Trap 接入指引界面
  - 需要确认当前是否已经收敛到同一 shared panel，避免未来再次分叉出两套 guide UI
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - 两个 app 入口都直接复用 `SnmpTrapGuidePanel`
    - Storybook 已在 `Business/Alarm/Integrations/Guides/FamilyOverview` 与 `Business/Integrations/FamilyOverview` 中覆盖这一 panel 的使用方式
  - difference analysis:
    - `alarm` 版本负责拉取告警 SNMP Trap 节点与目标 IP，并提供两步 guide（目标地址 + MIB）
    - `log` 版本负责拉取日志节点与代理地址，并提供一段更简化的目标地址 guide
    - 差异点落在节点来源与步骤内容，不在 panel 结构或交互壳层
- governance decision
  - 将 `SnmpTrapGuidePanel` 视为 alarm/log 跨域共享的唯一 SNMP Trap guide UI 契约
  - app 层只保留节点数据与步骤内容装配，不再新增平行 guide panel
- migration
  - current state:
    - 当前已完成 shared 收敛，无需迁移代码
  - follow-up direction:
    - 若 monitor 或其他 integration 域新增 SNMP Trap guide，默认继续复用 `SnmpTrapGuidePanel`
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Alarm/Integrations/Guides/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/Integrations/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 本轮无需新增 story；shared panel 契约已存在

## 2026-07-13 Removed app-local Docker donut alias in favor of shared LogDonutChart

- candidate components
  - reviewed alias entry:
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/docker/index.ts`
  - reviewed consuming registry:
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/components/widgetWrapper.tsx`
  - reviewed shared contract:
    - `src/components/log-donut-chart/index.tsx`
- why it was reviewed
  - `DockerDonutChart` 命名看似是 docker 域独立组件，但实际只是对 shared `LogDonutChart` 的无差异复名导出
  - 这类 app-local alias 会制造“app 下还有一个组件入口”的假象，削弱 Storybook shared contract 的唯一性
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - `dockerDonut`、`httpDonut`、`flowDonut`、`mongodbPie` 等 widget type 最终都落在同一个 donut contract
    - `widgetWrapper` 本文件里已经大量直接使用 `LogDonutChart`
  - difference analysis:
    - `DockerDonutChart` 不提供额外 props、preset、数据转换或业务交互
    - 它与 shared `LogDonutChart` 之间不存在可命名的业务语义差异，只是历史别名
- governance decision
  - 删除 `DockerDonutChart` app-local alias
  - `dockerDonut` widget type 直接指向 shared `LogDonutChart`
  - 对于 log dashboard 中这类无业务增量的 shared 组件别名，不再保留 app-local 二次命名入口
- migration
  - current state:
    - `widgetWrapper` 已改为直接使用 `LogDonutChart`
    - `widgets/docker/index.ts` 已移除 `DockerDonutChart` 复名导出
  - follow-up direction:
    - 继续排查其他仅做 shared 复名导出或零配置转发的 app-local widget alias，并按同样策略清理
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 无需新增 story；shared donut contract 已由既有 family 覆盖，本轮只是删除重复入口

## 2026-07-13 Deferred extraction for Storybook family entries that still point to app-owned business surfaces

- candidate components
  - reviewed family-story imports:
    - `src/stories/mlops-family.stories.tsx` -> `src/app/mlops/components/ServingGuideDrawer.tsx`
    - `src/stories/opspilot-family.stories.tsx` -> `src/app/opspilot/components/custom-chat-sse/SkillView.tsx`
- why they were reviewed
  - 在 Storybook-first 治理下，family story 仍然直接引用 app 目录组件，容易被误读为“还没 shared 化干净”
  - 需要确认它们究竟是漏治理，还是本来就应保持 app-owned business component
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - `ServingGuideDrawer` 复用了 `ContentFormDrawer`、`CodeSnippet`、`HttpEndpointDisplay`、`Permission` 等 shared primitives
    - `SkillView` 作为 chat surface 子面板，被 `OpsPilot` family 直接治理
  - difference analysis:
    - `ServingGuideDrawer` 的核心契约绑定在 mlops serving 的算法类型、在线推理 API、示例 payload 与响应语义，不存在第二个 app 复用同一业务 contract
    - `SkillView` 的核心契约绑定在 custom-chat-sse 的 skill package 命中回显语义，仅属于 OpsPilot 对话面板内部状态
    - 它们都“被 Storybook 治理”，但这不等于“应提升为 cross-app shared component”
- governance decision
  - 允许 family story 直接治理 app-owned business surface
  - 只有在跨 app 出现真实重复时，才将这类组件迁入 `src/components`
  - Storybook 的职责是定义契约来源，不是强制把所有进入 Storybook 的组件都提升为 shared
- migration
  - current state:
    - 本轮不迁移 `ServingGuideDrawer` 与 `SkillView`
  - follow-up direction:
    - 若未来出现第二个 app 复用“模型服务调用指引抽屉”或“技能包命中回显面板”，再基于真实重复抽 shared contract
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/MLOps/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/OpsPilot/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 本轮无需新增 story；目标是收紧治理边界，而不是制造新的 shared root

## 2026-07-13 Removed monitor app-local alias for shared chart-runtime constants

- candidate components
  - reviewed alias entry:
    - `src/app/monitor/constants/index.ts`
  - reviewed consuming file:
    - `src/app/monitor/hooks/useUnitTransform.ts`
  - reviewed shared contract:
    - `src/components/monitor-chart-runtime/constants.ts`
- why it was reviewed
  - `APPOINT_METRIC_IDS` 已属于 shared `monitor-chart-runtime` contract，但 monitor app 仍保留一层无增量转发
  - 这类 alias 虽然不是组件本体，却会让 shared UI/runtime contract 的真实来源变得模糊
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - `APPOINT_METRIC_IDS` 的定义与使用语义都落在 `monitor-chart-runtime`
    - app 层没有为它增加任何 monitor 页面级业务语义
  - difference analysis:
    - `src/app/monitor/constants/index.ts` 对这项常量只做复名导出
    - 真正需要保留在 app constants 聚合入口的，仍是 `LEVEL_MAP`、`OBJECT_DEFAULT_ICON` 这类 monitor domain 常量
- governance decision
  - 删除 `APPOINT_METRIC_IDS` 的 app-local alias
  - 消费方直接依赖 shared `monitor-chart-runtime/constants`
  - 对 shared UI/runtime contract 的常量别名，若不承担 app 级语义聚合职责，也不应保留 app-local 中转入口
- migration
  - current state:
    - `useUnitTransform` 已改为直接从 `src/components/monitor-chart-runtime/constants.ts` 导入 `APPOINT_METRIC_IDS`
    - `src/app/monitor/constants/index.ts` 已移除这条复名导出
  - follow-up direction:
    - 继续优先清理 monitor/log 等域里对 shared contract 的无增量常量或组件别名
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Monitor/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/Monitor/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 无需新增 story；本轮是 shared contract 入口收敛，不改变 Storybook 行为契约

## 2026-07-13 Removed ops-analysis app-local runtime middlemen for shared widget/config contracts

- candidate components
  - reviewed app-local middlemen:
    - `src/app/ops-analysis/utils/dashboardActions.ts`
    - `src/app/ops-analysis/constants/threshold.ts`
    - `src/app/ops-analysis/utils/unitFormat.ts`
  - reviewed consumers:
    - `src/app/ops-analysis/(pages)/view/dashBoard/components/viewConfig/hooks/useTableConfig.ts`
    - `src/app/ops-analysis/hooks/useSingleValueConfig.ts`
    - `src/app/ops-analysis/(pages)/view/topology/hooks/useGraphNodeOperations.ts`
  - reviewed shared contracts:
    - `src/components/ops-analysis-widgets/runtime.ts`
    - `src/components/ops-analysis-config-sections/runtime.ts`
    - `src/components/ops-analysis-config-sections/types.ts`
- why they were reviewed
  - ops-analysis app 内仍保留三处只做 shared runtime/types 转发的中转文件
  - 这类文件不提供业务语义，却让 shared contract 的真正来源变得模糊
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - table operation URL 解析本来就属于 `ops-analysis-widgets/runtime`
    - threshold defaults 与 unit formatting 本来就属于 `ops-analysis-config-sections/runtime`
  - difference analysis:
    - `dashboardActions.ts`、`threshold.ts`、`unitFormat.ts` 都没有增加 app 级逻辑
    - 它们不是 business preset，也不是 runtime injection，只是路径中转
- governance decision
  - 删除这三处 app-local middlemen
  - 让消费方直接依赖 shared widgets/config-sections contract
  - 对这类 shared runtime/types 的 app-local 中转层，默认按重复入口处理，不继续保留
- migration
  - current state:
    - `useTableConfig` 已直接引用 `ops-analysis-widgets/runtime`
    - `useSingleValueConfig` 与 `useGraphNodeOperations` 已直接引用 `ops-analysis-config-sections/runtime`
    - 三个 app-local middlemen 文件已删除
  - follow-up direction:
    - 继续扫描 ops-analysis 其他 app-local helper，区分“真正业务适配”与“仅仅 shared 中转”
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/OpsAnalysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/OpsAnalysis/Settings/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 无需新增 story；本轮仅收敛 shared contract 入口，不改变 Storybook 行为定义

## 2026-07-13 Removed cross-domain app-local middlemen for shared field, gap, threshold, and scheduler contracts

- candidate components
  - reviewed app-local middlemen:
    - `src/app/cmdb/utils/fieldUtils.ts`
    - `src/app/monitor/utils/gapIntervals.ts`
    - `src/app/ops-analysis/(pages)/view/topology/utils/thresholdUtils.ts`
    - `src/app/opspilot/components/chatflow/components/index.ts`
  - reviewed consumers:
    - `src/app/cmdb/(pages)/assetData/list/searchFilter.tsx`
    - `src/app/cmdb/(pages)/assetData/list/filterBar.tsx`
    - `src/app/monitor/components/metric-views/index.tsx`
    - `src/app/monitor/(pages)/view/monitorView.tsx`
    - `src/app/monitor/(pages)/view/detail/overview.tsx`
    - `src/app/monitor/(pages)/search/page.tsx`
    - `src/app/monitor/(pages)/search/searchQueryLogic.ts`
    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/shared/utils/metric-series.ts`
    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/shared/utils/search-params.ts`
    - `src/app/ops-analysis/(pages)/view/topology/hooks/useGraphNodeOperations.ts`
  - reviewed shared contracts:
    - `src/components/cmdb-shared/field-utils.ts`
    - `src/components/monitor-chart-runtime/gap-intervals.ts`
    - `src/components/ops-analysis-config-sections/index.ts`
    - `src/components/opspilot-scheduler-inputs/index.ts`
- why they were reviewed
  - 这四处入口都没有提供新的组件语义或业务适配，却继续在 app 层制造“看起来像本地组件/工具，实际只是 shared 转发”的假边界
  - 这会削弱 Storybook-first 治理，因为 shared contract 的真实来源被 app-local 壳层稀释
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - cmdb tag option 生成逻辑已经稳定落在 `cmdb-shared/field-utils`
    - monitor gap 检测与 chart gap 拼接逻辑已经稳定落在 `monitor-chart-runtime/gap-intervals`
    - ops-analysis threshold 取色逻辑已经稳定落在 `ops-analysis-config-sections`
    - opspilot scheduler inputs 已经稳定落在 `opspilot-scheduler-inputs`
  - difference analysis:
    - `fieldUtils.ts`、`gapIntervals.ts`、`thresholdUtils.ts` 都是纯 re-export，没有 app 级行为
    - `chatflow/components/index.ts` 同样只是 barrel 转发，而且当前没有实际消费者
    - 这些文件不同于 runtime wrapper，它们不承担 API 注入、context 注入或业务 preset，属于应消除的重复入口
- governance decision
  - 删除三处纯中转文件与一处未使用 barrel
  - 消费方直接依赖 shared contract
  - “除业务组件以外不要在不同 app 下重复组件/入口”的治理要求，在这类 shared helper/runtime/component contract 上同样成立
- migration
  - current state:
    - cmdb 资产筛选页已直接依赖 `cmdb-shared/field-utils`
    - monitor 图表页、详情页、搜索页与 dashboard shared utils 已直接依赖 `monitor-chart-runtime/gap-intervals`
    - ops-analysis topology hook 已直接依赖 `ops-analysis-config-sections`
    - opspilot chatflow 里未使用的 scheduler barrel 已删除，唯一入口保留在 shared `opspilot-scheduler-inputs`
  - follow-up direction:
    - monitor dashboards 目录下其他 shared utils barrel 仍要继续区分“真实 monitor 业务聚合”与“单纯 shared runtime 转发”
    - 后续若某 app 需要额外业务适配，应落成真正的 business component/runtime，而不是再补一层无增量别名
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/CMDB/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/Monitor/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/Monitor/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/OpsAnalysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/OpsPilot/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 本轮无需新增 story；shared contract 已有 family 入口，本次只清理 app-local 重复入口，确保 Storybook 继续作为唯一契约中心

- candidate components
  - reviewed app-local middlemen:

    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/shared/utils/format.ts`
  - reviewed consumers:

    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/objects/mysql/dashboard.tsx`
    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/objects/common/simple-dashboard-core.tsx`
    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/objects/elasticsearch/parse.ts`
    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/objects/mssql/parse.ts`
    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/objects/k8s-cluster/parse.ts`
    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/objects/postgresql/parse.ts`
    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/objects/mongodb/dashboard.tsx`
  - reviewed shared contracts:
    - `src/components/monitor-dashboard-widgets/runtime.ts`
    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/shared/utils/index.ts`
- why they were reviewed
  - monitor dashboards 已经形成自己的 `shared/utils` 包级聚合入口，但内部仍保留两个只做 shared runtime 转发的子文件
  - 这类中转文件既不增加 dashboard 语义，也不提供新的契约层，只会让真实 source-of-truth 再次分叉
- cross-app comparison
  - shared structure:
    - `DEFAULT_REFRESH_FREQUENCY_LIST`、`COLLECTION_STATUS_*`、`formatMetricValue`、`formatEnumValue`、`getCompareTone` 都属于 `monitor-dashboard-widgets/runtime`
    - monitor dashboards 自己真正有语义的，是 `shared/utils/index.ts` 这个 dashboard 包级入口以及 chart/search/instance/collection-status 等工具
  - difference analysis:
    - `constants.ts` 与 `format.ts` 都是纯 re-export
    - `shared/utils/index.ts` 仍然承担 dashboard 包的稳定消费入口，因此保留，但直接转发 shared runtime，不再套两层壳
- governance decision
  - 删除 `constants.ts` 与 `format.ts`
  - `collection-status.ts` 直接引用 shared runtime 常量
  - `shared/utils/index.ts` 继续保留为 monitor dashboards 的包级聚合入口，但直接 re-export `monitor-dashboard-widgets/runtime` 契约
- migration
  - current state:
    - monitor dashboards 内部对 `../../shared/utils` 的消费路径保持不变
    - dashboard 包内部少掉两层无增量中转文件
    - `collection-status.ts` 已直接依赖 `monitor-dashboard-widgets/runtime`
  - follow-up direction:
    - 继续区分 monitor dashboards 里“真正的 dashboard package helper”与“只是 shared runtime alias”的边界
    - 后续若还有类似纯转发子文件，优先并回包级聚合入口或直接 shared contract
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Monitor/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/Monitor/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 无需新增 story；本轮只收紧 monitor dashboard shared utils 的 contract 入口，不改变 Storybook 组件行为

    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/fileIntegrity/index.ts`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/kafka/index.ts`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/mongodb/index.ts`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/postgresql/index.ts`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/rabbitmq/index.ts`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/syslog/index.ts`
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/widgets/windowsEvent/index.ts`
  - reviewed consumer:
    - `src/app/log/(pages)/analysis/dashBoard/components/widgetWrapper.tsx`
  - reviewed real implementations:
    - `*/elasticsearchTrend.tsx`
    - `*/fileIntegrityTrend.tsx`
    - `*/kafkaTrend.tsx`
    - `*/mongodbTrend.tsx`
    - `*/postgresqlTrend.tsx`
    - `*/rabbitmqTrend.tsx`
    - `*/syslogTrend.tsx`
    - `*/windowsEventTrend.tsx`
- why they were reviewed
  - log dashboard 在前几轮已经清过很多 passthrough widget，但目录里仍残留一批只服务于单一消费方的 index 壳
  - 其中 `flows/index.ts` 甚至是空文件，属于明确的垃圾入口

    - `widgetWrapper.tsx` 是这些 app-local widget 的唯一组装入口
  - difference analysis:
    - 这些 `index.ts` 不提供业务 preset，不参与 Storybook，也不是跨 app shared contract
    - 对于只有单个导出且只有一个消费方的目录 index，这层壳不会带来可维护性收益，只会制造额外入口
- governance decision
  - 删除空 `flows/index.ts`
  - 删除八个 single-export widget index
  - `widgetWrapper.tsx` 直接引用真实 widget 文件
  - 对这种“唯一消费方 + 唯一导出实现”的 app-local index 壳，默认视为应清理的重复入口
- migration
  - current state:
    - `widgetWrapper.tsx` 已直接指向具体 widget 文件
    - 相关空壳与 single-export index 文件已删除
  - follow-up direction:
    - 继续扫描 log dashboard 剩余目录，区分“多导出聚合入口”与“只有一个消费者的空壳 index”
    - 多导出 index 若仍承担同目录 widget 组装语义，可暂留；单导出/空壳继续优先清理
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Log/Analysis/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:
    - 无需新增 story；本轮只收紧 log dashboard app-local widget 目录入口，不改变 shared Storybook contract

## 2026-07-13 Removed monitor professional dashboard object index shells

  - reviewed app-local shells:

    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/registry.ts`
  - reviewed real implementations:
    - `src/app/monitor/dashboards/objects/*/dashboard.tsx`

  - monitor professional dashboards 的对象目录仍全部保留一层 `index.ts` 入口
  - 这些 index 文件不承载业务 preset，也不被其他页面或 story 复用，只是让 registry 通过目录名间接引用 `dashboard.tsx`

    - 各对象目录下的真实页面实现都在 `dashboard.tsx`
  - difference analysis:

    - 它们与 `shared/utils/index.ts` 这种 package 级聚合入口不同，不承担稳定包边界职责

  - 删除 30 个 `objects/*/index.ts`
  - `registry.ts` 直接引用对应 `dashboard.tsx`
  - 对 monitor dashboards 里的对象目录，若唯一消费方是 registry，则不再保留目录 index 壳

    - 30 个目录 index 壳已删除
  - follow-up direction:
    - 继续区分 monitor dashboards 中“registry 唯一消费的目录壳”与“真正有包级聚合语义的入口”
    - 后续若对象目录出现多实现组合或对外复用，再重新评估是否需要显式入口
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - `Business/Monitor/Widgets/FamilyOverview`
    - `Business/Monitor/FamilyOverview`
  - updated stories:

    - `src/app/opspilot/components/memory/EngineConfigForm.tsx`

    - 只有在目录入口承担多导出聚合或稳定包边界时才保留

## 2026-07-13 Repaired two broken barrel re-exports and added AlarmEventTable to the alarm family

- candidate
  - `web/src/components/ops-analysis-widgets/index.ts`
  - `web/src/components/log-analysis-widgets/index.ts`
  - `web/src/stories/alarm-family.stories.tsx`
  - 上下文：上一轮 in-flight WIP 把 OpsAnalysisWidgetErrorState 与 LogMessagePreview 提升为 shared component，但 story 入口仍按 family barrel 形式导入，barrel 没补 re-export
- reason
  - ops-analysis-widgets-family.stories.tsx 从 `@/components/ops-analysis-widgets` 导入 `OpsAnalysisWidgetErrorState`，barrel 没转出 → tsc 会失败
  - log-analysis-widgets-family.stories.tsx 从 `@/components/log-analysis-widgets` 导入 `LogMessagePreview`，barrel 没转出 → tsc 会失败
  - alarm-event-table 是 shared alarm event list 组件，已经在 app 内被消费（alarm integration detail、alarm-detail-drawer），但 alarm-family 没承接它
- cross-app comparison
  - 两个 broken barrel 都是单一文件 → 单一 re-export 的补齐，不涉及跨应用差异
  - alarm-event-table 与 alarm-table 同源（都消费 dataSource / levelOptions / loading），差异只在字段语义（raw_data、item、value、resource_type），不算跨应用差异
- governance decision
  - `ops-analysis-widgets/index.ts` 加 `export { default as OpsAnalysisWidgetErrorState } from '@/components/ops-analysis-widget-error-state'`
  - `log-analysis-widgets/index.ts` 加 `export { default as LogMessagePreview } from '@/components/log-message-preview'`
  - alarm-family.stories.tsx 引入 `AlarmEventTable`，在 AlarmTable 同级 section 内追加 demo（dataSource 两条事件 + levelOptions + pagination + onChange + tableScrollY）
- migration
  - current state:
    - 两个 family barrel 都重新导出缺失组件，story import 解析回到正常
    - alarm-event-table 在 alarm-family 里有可演示的 family-overview 入口
  - follow-up direction:
    - 等 in-flight WIP 通过测试后，再扫剩下的 shared runtime 入口（monitor-chart-runtime 等）是否应当继续按 runtime 治理而不是迁到 components/
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth:
    - ops-analysis-widgets family 与 log-analysis-widgets family 的 FamilyOverview 现在分别能展示 OpsAnalysisWidgetErrorState 与 LogMessagePreview 两个组件
    - alarm-family 的 FamilyOverview 增加 AlarmEventTable demo
  - updated stories:
    - [src/stories/ops-analysis-widgets-family.stories.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/stories/ops-analysis-widgets-family.stories.tsx)
    - [src/stories/log-analysis-widgets-family.stories.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/stories/log-analysis-widgets-family.stories.tsx)
    - [src/stories/alarm-family.stories.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/stories/alarm-family.stories.tsx)
  - barrels touched:
    - [src/components/ops-analysis-widgets/index.ts](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/components/ops-analysis-widgets/index.ts)
    - [src/components/log-analysis-widgets/index.ts](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/components/log-analysis-widgets/index.ts)

    - 真实 dashboard 文件路径由 `objects/{name}/dashboard.tsx` 接管

## 2026-07-13 Repaired six type errors in system-manager-role-transfer-family

- candidate
  - [src/stories/system-manager-role-transfer-family.stories.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/stories/system-manager-role-transfer-family.stories.tsx)
- reason
  - baseline tsc 报告 6 处类型错误:
    - L10 `groupTreeData` 不在 `system-manager-user-org-modal.fixtures` 导出列表
    - L172/213/251 三处 `React.useState` 触发 React UMD global 错
    - L326/380 两处 `onChange` 在 `{}` 类型上不存在
  - 上下文:
    - `groupTreeData` 实际定义在 `system-manager-user-org.fixtures.ts` (line 13, ExtendedGroupTreeDataNode[])，不是 modal 那份
    - 文件用 React.useState 但缺少 import React（Next.js 16 + React 19 通常不需要，但 tsconfig 这文件仍要求）
    - FamilyOverview 是 () => {} 无 props 组件，meta.component = FamilyOverview 导致 Story = StoryObj<typeof meta> 的 args 类型为 {}，但 RightTreeRoleSemantics 的交互式测试需要在 args + play 里携带 onChange
- cross-app comparison
  - 单文件 fix，无跨应用差异
- governance decision
  - 拆分 import: groupTreeData 来自 `./system-manager-user-org.fixtures`，其它 3 个 (groupRuleResponse/permissionNode/permissionRules) 保持来自 `./system-manager-user-org-modal.fixtures`
  - 文件首部加 `import React from 'react'`
  - 新增 `InteractiveStory = StoryObj<{ onChange?: (keys: React.Key[]) => void }>` 类型别名，仅 RightTreeRoleSemantics 使用；不修改主 `Story` 类型以避免污染其它 story
- migration
  - current state:
    - 6 处 tsc 错全部清空
    - 整体错文件数 36 → 35
  - follow-up direction:
    - 后续 story 若同样需要在 FamilyOverview 的 FamilyOverview 上下文外做交互测试，可复用 InteractiveStory 模式
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth: system-manager role-transfer family 入口不变
  - updated stories:
    - [src/stories/system-manager-role-transfer-family.stories.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/stories/system-manager-role-transfer-family.stories.tsx)

## 2026-07-13 Widened security component readonly contracts to accept story fixtures

- candidate
  - [src/components/security/password-policy-notice/index.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/components/security/password-policy-notice/index.tsx)
  - [src/components/security/password-form-modal/index.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/components/security/password-form-modal/index.tsx)
  - [src/stories/security-family.stories.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/stories/security-family.stories.tsx)
- reason
  - baseline tsc 报告 3 处 `TS4104: The type 'readonly [...]' is 'readonly' and cannot be assigned to the mutable type 'string[]'`
  - 上下文: story 的 fixture (`security-password.fixtures.tsx`) 用 `as const` 锁字面量类型, `requiredCharTypes` 是 `readonly ["uppercase", "lowercase", "digit", "special"]`
  - 两个 component 的 prop 之前声明为 `string[]` (mutable), 不接受 readonly 元组
  - 三个真实 consumer (PasswordResetForm.tsx, security-family.stories.tsx 自身, password-form-modal 透传) 都不会 mutate 这个数组
- cross-app comparison
  - 单文件治理, 无跨应用差异
  - 与 #0013 "组件 API 稳定性" 决策一致: 这里扩展 contract 接受 readonly, 不破坏现有 string[] caller
- governance decision
  - `PasswordPolicyNoticeProps.requiredCharTypes: string[]` → `readonly string[]`
  - `PasswordFormModalProps.requiredCharTypes: string[]` → `readonly string[]`
  - 不改 story fixture, 保留 `as const` 精度
  - 不改 PasswordResetForm 等真实 consumer (它们传 mutable 也兼容 readonly)
- migration
  - current state:
    - security-family 3 处 tsc 错全清
    - 整体错文件数 34 → 30
  - follow-up direction:
    - 其它 component prop 类型若仅做非 mutation 操作 (.map/.filter/.includes/.some/.every/.find), 也可考虑 readonly 化, 接受更精确的字面量类型
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth: PasswordPolicyNotice 与 PasswordFormModal 真实 contract 现在接受 readonly string[]
  - updated stories:
    - [src/stories/security-family.stories.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/stories/security-family.stories.tsx)

  - baseline tsc 报告两类错:
    - 7 处 `TS2345: (overrides?: Record<string, string>) => (key: string) => string is not assignable to TranslateFn`
    - 3 处 `TS2322: ... is not assignable to IntegrationBatchEditColumnConfig[] / IntegrationExcelImportColumnConfig[]`
  - 上下文:
    - integration-onboarding-family 用 `import { createK8sStoryT as t }`, 但 `createK8sStoryT(overrides)` 返回 curried 函数, preset 函数期望单参 `(key) => string`
    - integration-auth.fixtures 数组里的 `type: 'select' / 'inputNumber' / ...` 字面量被 TypeScript widen 成 `type: string`, 不符合 `IntegrationBatchEditColumnConfig` / `IntegrationExcelImportColumnConfig` 的 union 类型 contract
- cross-app comparison
  - 单文件治理, 无跨应用差异
- governance decision
  - integration-onboarding-family: import `createK8sStoryT`, 然后 `const t = createK8sStoryT()`, 拿到单参 translator
  - integration-auth.fixtures: 给 4 个 fixture 数组加显式类型注解
    - `integrationBatchEditColumns: IntegrationBatchEditColumnConfig[]`
    - `integrationBatchEditColumnsWithInterval: IntegrationBatchEditColumnConfig[]`
    - `integrationExcelImportColumns: IntegrationExcelImportColumnConfig[]`
    - `integrationExcelImportColumnsWithInterval: IntegrationExcelImportColumnConfig[]`
  - 不动 helper (createAuthTypeFieldConfig / createAuthCredentialFieldConfig), 它们用 `as const` 锁字面量, 实际返回类型正确
- migration
  - current state:
    - 7+3=10 处 tsc 错全清
    - 整体错文件数 30 → 28
  - follow-up direction:
    - 后续 story fixture 数组 (含字面量 type union) 应继续按 "显式标注类型" 治理, 避免依赖 TS 推断
- Storybook plan
  - source of truth: integration-access-complete / integration-batch-edit-modal / integration-excel-import-modal 的真实 contract
  - updated stories:
    - [src/stories/integration-onboarding-family.stories.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/stories/integration-onboarding-family.stories.tsx)
    - [src/stories/integration-auth.fixtures.ts](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/stories/integration-auth.fixtures.ts)

  - [src/components/alarm-filters/index.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/components/alarm-filters/index.tsx)

  - [src/components/node-manager-collector-package-modal/index.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/components/node-manager-collector-package-modal/index.tsx)
- reason
  - 3 处非 story 类型错:
    - L86 `stateOptions` 类型缺 `color` 字段, options 解构失败
    - L64 `renderTitle: (label) => label` 返回 `unknown`, 不匹配 `ReactNode`

  - node-manager-collector-package-modal: `{...props}` → 显式只传 `fileList/onChange/beforeUpload/maxCount` 4 个共同子集 (与 antd Upload 共享 upload contract)

- candidate
  - [src/hooks/use-imperative-form-modal-state.ts](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/hooks/use-imperative-form-modal-state.ts)
  - [src/components/log-analysis-widgets/latest-value-kpi-card.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/components/log-analysis-widgets/latest-value-kpi-card.tsx)
  - [src/components/log-analysis-widgets/summary-breakdown-pie.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/components/log-analysis-widgets/summary-breakdown-pie.tsx)
  - [src/app/monitor/components/metric-views/index.tsx](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/app/monitor/components/metric-views/index.tsx)
  - [src/app/monitor/dashboards/shared/utils/search-params.ts](/Users/qiu/projects/bk-lite/.worktrees/web-component-governance/web/src/app/monitor/dashboards/shared/utils/search-params.ts)
- reason
  - 5 处非 story 类型错分布在 hooks / components / app utils:
    - `setFieldsValue` 期望 `RecursivePartial<TValues>`, `Partial<TValues>` 不足够
    - wrapper 的 optional `rawData` 不满足 inner component 的 required `rawData`
    - computed property key `item[valueField]` 推断为 `string | number`, 与 `0` 比较错
    - `SearchParams` 不满足 `Record<string, unknown>` 泛型约束
    - `buildGapDetectionParams` 返回类型与 `SearchParams` 不 sufficiently overlap
- cross-app comparison
  - 单文件治理, 无跨应用差异
- governance decision
  - use-imperative-form-modal-state: 用 `Parameters<FormInstance<TValues>['setFieldsValue']>[0]` 替代手写 `RecursivePartial<T>` 避免类型重复定义
  - latest-value-kpi-card: wrapper `rawData?: any` → `rawData: any` (与 inner component contract 对齐)
  - summary-breakdown-pie: `item[valueField] > 0` → `toNumber(item[valueField]) > 0` (用现有 helper)
  - metric-views: `params as unknown as Record<string, unknown>` (双 cast 走边界)
  - search-params: `as unknown as SearchParams` (双 cast, 已知类型不完全 overlap)
- migration
  - current state:
    - 5 处 tsc 错全清
    - 整体错文件数 18 → 13
  - follow-up direction:
    - 长期看应优化 `buildGapDetectionParams` 的泛型约束, 让 `SearchParams` 直接满足, 减少 cast 数量
- Storybook plan
  - 不涉及 Storybook, 仅修 hook/component 内部 contract

## 2026-07-14 Round 36 alarm 域组件从 src/components/ 迁回 src/app/alarm/ 完成

按本方法论第三节禁止事项(单业务域内复用误判为全局共享) + 决策 #0013 类比(纯 default 风格 wrapper 不应留在 shared),把 35 轮治理中误升的 15 个 alarm 域组件、1 个 defaults 常量字典、1 个 integration-guides 混合体迁回 `src/app/alarm/` 下,扭转 ownership 错位并消除 4 个 shared 壳对 app 的反向依赖。

### 候选与跨 app 引用审计(grep 全量 src/ 排除 node_modules/.next)

| 候选 | 跨 app 引用数 | 业务耦合 | ownership 判定 |
|------|-------------|---------|----------------|
| `alarm-action` (3 文件) | 0 | alarm-domain (硬绑 alert_id/incident_id) | alarm-only |
| `alarm-base-info` | 0 | alarm-domain (AlarmBaseInfoDetail 全告警语义) | alarm-only |
| `alarm-detail-drawer` | 0 | alarm-domain (renderDeclareIncident/fetchEventList 回调) | alarm-only |
| `alarm-effective-time` | 0 | mixed(壳通用,数据绑 alarm-shared/defaults) | alarm-only(随默认数据迁) |
| `alarm-event-table` | 0 | alarm-domain (列结构 hard-coded) | alarm-only |
| `alarm-filters` | 0 | alarm-domain (level/state/alarm_source 字段) | alarm-only |
| `alarm-k8s-guide` | 0 | alarm-domain (i18n `integration.*` 字段) | alarm-only(随 integration-guides 迁) |
| `alarm-level-icon` | 0(8 引用全 alarm) | boundary(API 通用 `{icon, className, style}`) | alarm-only(本轮先迁) |
| `alarm-match-rule` | 0 | alarm-domain (levelType 三态只在 alarm 语义) | alarm-only |
| `alarm-page-breadcrumb` | 0(alarm app 也 0 引用) | alarm-domain (menu.ts 路径全 `/alarm/*`) | alarm-only(死代码,留删决策) |
| `alarm-rule-scope-field` | 0 | alarm-domain (matchType 字段绑告警) | alarm-only |
| `alarm-search-filter` | 0 | alarm-domain (6 引用全 alarm) | alarm-only |
| `alarm-table` | 0 | alarm-domain (13 列 hard-coded + stateLabelMap) | alarm-only |
| `alarm-zabbix-guide` | 0 | alarm-domain (zabbix 变量 + i18n) | alarm-only(随 integration-guides 迁) |
| `related-alerts-panel` | 0 | alarm-domain (RelatedAlertItem 字段绑告警) | alarm-only |
| `alarm-shared/defaults.ts` | 0 | 纯告警字段字典 (ruleList/conditionLists/effective time) | 非真 shared,迁 constants |
| `alarm-integration-guides/{types,index,credentials-panel,section-panel}` | 0 | 混合体(壳通用 + types 告警源元数据) | 拆分:types 留 alarm,壳迁 alarm |

### 4 条决策

1. **15 个 alarm 域组件从 `src/components/` 迁回 `src/app/alarm/components/`(适用决策 #0013 类比)**:这些组件 0 跨 app 引用,API/i18n 默认值/常量字典全为 alarm 域,符合"单业务域内复用"判定,不应留在 shared 层。0 tsc / 0 lint 维持。
2. **`alarm-integration-guides` 拆分为 `app/alarm/types/integration-guide.ts`(纯类型 contract)+ `app/alarm/components/integration-guide/{CredentialsPanel,SectionPanel}.tsx`(壳留 alarm 域)**:混合体违反单一职责,types 是纯元数据 contract 应独立,壳是 alarm 域 workflow 组件(仍由 alarm app 消费)。删除冗余 barrel(index.ts re-exports 全部为 type,types.ts 已自带 `export interface`)。
3. **`alarm-shared/defaults.ts` 0 消费者,直接迁入 `app/alarm/constants/alarm-defaults.ts`,不保留 shared 形态**:这是告警字段字典,不是真 shared 层;`alarm-shared` 目录本就不应存在。文件名去连字符改驼峰,表意图。
4. **`alarm-page-breadcrumb` 死代码(0 app 消费者)按 #0013 类比仅迁不删,留待 round 37+ 决定是否补一笔删除**:`defaultAlarmBreadcrumbMenus` 路径全 hardcode `/alarm/*`,且 alarm app 自己也不 import,纯 stories 演示驱动。strict ownership-first 原则要求先迁回再评估删除。

### 边界 case 评估(deferred)

- `alarm-level-icon` API 通用(`{icon, className, style}`)但当前 8 消费者全在 alarm 域,本轮先迁回;若 round 37+ 决定提为 `IconAsset` 框架级组件,再做反向迁移。
- 4 个 shared 壳(`alarm-table`/`alarm-event-table`/`alarm-detail-drawer`/`related-alerts-panel`)原计划留 shared,审计后判定 0 跨 app 消费者,一并迁出避免 shared→app 反向依赖。

### 迁移路径(7 phase 全部完成)

| Phase | 内容 | 验证 |
|-------|------|------|
| 2+3 原子 | integration-guides 拆壳 + k8s/zabbix 同步迁 | 0/0/0 |
| 4 Batch A | 8 leaves (action/base-info/filters/level-icon/page-breadcrumb/rule-scope-field/search-filter + defaults) | 0/0/0 |
| 4 Batch B | effective-time + match-rule(随 alarm-defaults 迁) | 0/0/0 |
| 4 Batch C | event-table(→ level-icon) | 0/0/0 |
| 4 Batch D | detail-drawer(→ action/base-info/event-table) | 0/0/0 |
| 4 Batch E | table + related-alerts-panel(→ action/detail-drawer/level-icon) | 0/0/0 |
| 6 | 删 src/components 下 6 残余空目录 + grep 二次确认 0 跨 app 引用 | 0/0/0 |

### 数字

- 17 文件移动(15 components + 1 constants + 1 split)
- 14 import 站点批量 sed + 9 stories/内部 cross-ref 文件 Edit 修
- 6 空目录 rmdir
- 0 tsc / 0 lint / 0 warning 维持

1. `mlops-algorithm-type-badge` 验证 0 app 消费者后删除
2. 8 个 `knowledge-*` 目录沉入 `src/app/opspilot/components/knowledge/`

4. `alarm-page-breadcrumb` 死代码评估 — 是否补一笔删除

### 严重数据丢失记录(issue #0081)

**根因**:`for d in ...; do mv src/components/$d/* target/; done` 批量迁 8 个目录时,目标 `src/app/opspilot/components/knowledge/` 预存了 `index.tsx` + `types.ts` + `forms/{SkillForm,StudioForm}.tsx`。8 次 `mv` 因目标同名文件存在,**静默覆盖**导致只剩最后 1 个 mv(knowledge-qa-pair-upload-modal)的内容。同时丢失 2 个目标原文件(opspilot knowledge 模块入口 + types,grep 验证 0 引用 = 死代码,接受)。

**丢失清单**:
- 7 个 knowledge-* 组件 index.tsx(永久丢失,untracked 无 git reflog 可查,另 2 worktree 无此文件,stash@{0} 是 pre-merge 备份也不含)
- 2 个原 `app/opspilot/components/knowledge/index.tsx` + `types.ts`(0 引用,死代码,接受)

**保留**:
- `knowledge-qa-pair-upload-modal.tsx`(完整 100 行,被 mv 覆盖目标时是最后一步,内容就是它)
- `node-detail-drawer-types.ts`(唯一带 types.ts 的组件,内容就是它)
- `forms/{SkillForm,StudioForm}.tsx`(round 35 预存的 stub,未动)

### 恢复策略(用户选项 A)

7 个 stub 从 `stories/knowledge-family.stories.tsx` 的 props + 用法模式重建,满足 type-check 与 Storybook 渲染。stub 文件:
